footer.description: BMM Cesar is a family team of three brothers combining construction, mechanics, and software into practical project delivery.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: BMM Cesar is built by three brothers with different skills and one shared standard: quality execution.
about.missionText: We are not trying to be a generic agency. We combine field work, machine knowledge, and digital delivery in one team.
about.storyText: Real projects often overlap: renovation, machine reliability, and software visibility. Our model reflects that reality.
about.teamText: We are still in an early growth phase, so we stay realistic, responsive, and direct in communication.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Each branch has a clear focus, together forming one coordinated company.

branches.title: Construction
branches.description: Renovation and finishing work for residential and business spaces.

branches.title: Tuning & mechanics
branches.description: Diagnostics, tuning, and service for vehicles and work machines.

branches.title: IT / software
branches.description: Digital products for online presence, operations, and automation.

services.approachText: We begin with a short call, define goals and scope, then execute transparently with clear milestones.

projects.title: Work areas and solution examples

projects.noteText: BMM Cesar is developing its public portfolio. The examples below represent typical work areas and practical solutions.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Send your inquiry and include the branch: Construction, Mechanics, or IT.
contact.detailsText: For faster response, include location and a short project/issue description.
contact.ctaText: Attach photos, requirements, or context if you already have them prepared.
